ATTY. DAVID S. RAND, TEL. NO. 380-1210 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

ATTY. DAVID S. RAND, TEL. NO. 380-1210 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTIONS 2 AND 6 AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO STATE A CLAIM FOR TRESSPASS TO CHATTELS IF PLAINTIFF CHOOSES TO DO SO.
